marketContext: India biscuit market ≈ US$5.5–6.0 bn (~₹48,000 Cr) in 2024; growth ~6.5% CAGR. The top 3 players hold >70% (industry estimates vary by report and scope).
disclaimer: Listed companies (Britannia, ITC) show AUDITED financials, sourced. Private / D2C groups (Parle, Mondelez India, Unibic, The Whole Truth) and ALL market-share %s are ESTIMATES drawn from public RoC filings and industry reports — never audited biscuit-only figures. Reporting periods are not perfectly aligned (see each note).
shareNote: Market-share % is industry-report-sourced (e.g. Statista / Nielsen / Euromonitor) and is labelled ESTIMATE for EVERY company, including listed ones — exact share is not audited.

companies.shareSource: Statista — India biscuit companies market share, 2023
companies.source: Britannia Industries FY24 results / Annual Report — consolidated revenue from operations ₹16,546 Cr, +3.5% YoY (AUDITED)
companies.notes: AUDITED. Britannia reports a single bakery segment; biscuits are ~75–80% of revenue (rest: cakes, rusk, bread, dairy), so this overstates biscuit-only somewhat. Leader by VALUE — Parle leads by volume. The 31% share is an industry-report estimate.

companies.source: ITC FY24 Annual Report — Branded Packaged Foods segment ₹17,194 Cr (AUDITED); Sunfeast biscuit revenue ESTIMATED (ITC does not break out biscuits)
companies.notes: Foods-segment revenue is AUDITED (₹17,194 Cr) but bundles Aashirvaad, Bingo, Sunfeast etc. The Sunfeast biscuit figure (~₹5,000 Cr), share and YoY are ESTIMATES — ITC discloses no biscuit-only line.

companies.shareSource: Statista — India biscuit companies market share, 2023
companies.source: Parle Products Pvt Ltd RoC filing — total revenue ₹17,223 Cr FY23 (biscuits + confectionery); biscuit split ESTIMATED. FY25 revenue +8.5% (BestMediaInfo).
companies.notes: ESTIMATE. Parle Products' total revenue (₹17,223 Cr FY23) is RoC-filed but includes confectionery; biscuits (~₹15k Cr) are the majority. Volume LEADER — Parle-G is the world's largest-selling biscuit. 29% share is an industry-report estimate.

companies.source: Mondelez India ~US$2 bn revenue (mostly Cadbury chocolate); Oreo / biscuit revenue ESTIMATED
companies.notes: ESTIMATE. India is Oreo's 3rd-largest market, but Mondelez doesn't disclose India biscuit revenue; ~₹2,000 Cr is a rough estimate of the Oreo / biscuit slice of its ~US$2 bn India business. Lotus Biscoff tie-up adds upside.

companies.source: Unibic Foods India Pvt Ltd — operating revenue > ₹500 Cr FY24 (ICRA rating rationale / RoC filings)
companies.notes: ESTIMATE. Cookie-focused; revenue (~just over ₹500 Cr) from RoC filings. One of the faster-growing premium-cookie brands; share and growth are estimates.

companies.source: The Whole Truth Foods — revenue ₹216 Cr FY25 (+232% YoY), ₹65 Cr FY24 (RoC filings / Entrackr); biscuit/cookie subset estimated
companies.notes: ESTIMATE — D2C exemplar. Sells protein bars / peanut butter / chocolate AND protein cookies; biscuit-specific revenue is a small subset of the ₹216 Cr total. Explosive growth off a tiny base; represents the emerging D2C protein-biscuit wave.

companies.source: Residual market (industry estimates) — regional & smaller players
companies.notes: ESTIMATE — residual ~25% held by regional & smaller players (Priyagold, Anmol, Bisk Farm, Dukes, Cremica) plus many D2C brands. Shown so the share chart sums to ~100%; excluded from the revenue ranking & classification cards (no clean biscuit-revenue figure).
